name: Risotto Ai Funghi
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a pan and sauté onions until translucent.
2. Add sliced fresh mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and begin to brown.
3. Stir in the rice, cooking for about 2 minutes until slightly golden.
4. Deglaze with white wine or cider, stirring constantly until the liquid is absorbed.
5. Gradually add hot stock (from a simmered dried mushroom mixture) a ladle at a time, allowing each portion to be absorbed before adding more.
6. Stir in cooked dried mushrooms and season with salt.
7. Finish by stirring in butter and grated parmesan until well incorporated.
8. Serve immediately.
